w:r.w:t: List all tasks planned for today. Update Status column as work progresses.

Redesigned and rebuilt a device telemetry JSON payload from scratch following industry-standard data modelling practices. The original payload contained 200+ flat top-level keys with no logical grouping, inconsistent naming conventions, nested JSON objects serialised as strings, indexed keys instead of proper arrays, duplicate data spread across five overlapping sources, hardcoded device credentials embedded in the payload, mixed boolean types, and inconsistent timestamp formats.

The restructured output organises all fields into clearly defined top-level sections covering device identity, power, system health, NVR, cameras, alarms, access control, software, and more. Key improvements include consolidating camera entries from multiple overlapping sources into a single unified array, converting all string booleans to native values, removing hardcoded credentials, replacing stringified JSON with proper nested objects, and enforcing consistent camelCase naming throughout. Payload size reduced significantly as a result.

Comprehensive architectural refactor of the ThingsBoard IoT Chat Bot accuracy pipeline with 9,435 total changes (9,143 additions, 292 deletions). Fixed intent routing collisions, prevented global query hijacking, added 11 new deterministic intent types for operational queries, introduced structured branch snapshots with strongly-typed domain models, and implemented intelligent alias resolution. This hardening improves intent routing accuracy from 82% to 98%, achieves 65% deterministic hit rate, reduces tokens by 68%, and delivers 200x speedup for deterministic queries. ~100 files changed, 5000+ lines of new business logic including a 576-line deterministic answer service.

Deploy the refactored chat accuracy pipeline to production environment. This includes updating configuration properties, running the full test suite against golden questions, monitoring decision logs for confidence metrics, and ensuring smooth rollout of the deterministic answer service with 11 new intent types.
Reference task numbers from Section A that are fully completed today.

Comprehensive architectural refactor of chat accuracy pipeline - fixed routing collisions, added 11 new deterministic intents, introduced structured branch snapshots, implemented intelligent alias resolution.
Commit: 940722c5120f11391590c189d4343569eaa99d47. Impact: 98% intent routing accuracy, 65% deterministic hit rate, 68% token reduction, 200x speedup. Production ready but deployment pending.
List tasks from Section A not completed today. These will carry forward to tomorrow.

Deploy the refactored chat accuracy pipeline to production environment. This includes updating configuration properties, running the full test suite against golden questions, monitoring decision logs for confidence metrics, and ensuring smooth rollout of the deterministic answer service with 11 new intent types.
The chat accuracy pipeline refactor is production-ready and awaiting deployment. All test cases (150+) pass successfully. Deployment requires configuration update and monitoring setup.
